parameters.body/message/body/content:
🚨 ALERT: Finance System Data Refresh Failure - P&L Forecast Impact

FINANCE SYSTEM ALERT: P&L Forecast Calculation Refresh Failure

What happened:

The system has detected a failure in the PnL Calculation Flow power automate process.

Business Impact:
  • Account Managers may see outdated or missing P&L values
Technical Details:
  • Power Automate Flow:PnL Calculation Flow
  • Error occurred during triggered refresh at: @{formatDateTime(convertTimeZone(utcNow(), 'UTC', 'Central Standard Time'), 'yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm tt')} CST
  • Error details:
    @{coalesce(triggerOutputs()?['body/msdyn_errorinfojson'],'unexpected error')}
Next Steps:
  1. The IT team has been notified and will investigate the issue
For technical assistance:

Contact @{parameters('Support Email (bs_SupportEmail)')} and reference this alert.
